SUBHEADER: Remember the number positions in order
FOOTER: Click the boxes in numerical order
INSTRUCTIONS:
In this task, you will see numbered boxes appear on the screen. After a brief moment, the numbers will be hidden. Your job is to click on the boxes in numerical order (1, 2, 3, etc.).

If you click the correct box, it will turn green. If you click the wrong box, it will turn red and the trial will end.

The task starts with a few boxes and gets harder as you progress. Try to remember where each number is!

Click anywhere to begin practice trials.
